policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: O: state/federal AI safety coordination update
items.summary: O published an article on US AI safety progress, referencing state-led frontier safety legislation aligning toward a national baseline. It frames “reverse federalism” as groundwork for a US-led global framework.

items.headline: O: Jalapeño inference chip unveiled with Broadcom
items.summary: O and Broadcom unveiled “Jalapeño,” described as O’s first Intelligence Processor for LLM inference. The release cites nine-month tape-out, performance-per-watt improvements, and deployment planning toward gigawatt-scale data centers.

items.headline: G: $650M growth capital for GroqCloud expansion
items.summary: G announced $650M in new growth capital to accelerate expansion of its AI inference cloud, with stated intent to scale GroqCloud capacity and support rising inference demand.
